auth.phone.title: Enter your phone number
auth.phone.subtitle: We'll send an OTP to keep your khata secure.
auth.phone.label: Phone number
auth.phone.secure_note: Phone OTP keeps the khata tied to the person using it.

auth.otp.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone.

auth.profile.subtitle: This is the name people will see in your khata.

auth.profile.preview.label: Profile preview
auth.profile.helper: You can change your name later from Settings.
auth.validation.phone_invalid: Check that this is a valid Bangladeshi phone number

auth.error.otp_expired: This OTP expired. Send a new one.
auth.error.profile_failed: We couldn't save your profile. Try again.
common.error.generic: Something went wrong — please try again.
common.error.offline: You're offline — please try again later.

groups.settings.leave.subtitle: Allowed only when your balance is zero

groups.settings.leave.confirm.body: Baki will block this if you still owe or are owed money here.
groups.settings.delete.subtitle: Creator only, and only when all balances are zero
groups.settings.delete.creatorOnly: Only the creator can delete this khata
groups.settings.delete.confirm.title: Delete this khata?
groups.settings.delete.confirm.body: This soft-deletes the khata only if nobody has an outstanding balance.

reports.monthly.title: Monthly khata report
reports.monthly.subtitle: {{groupName}} · current month preview
reports.monthly.empty: No activity in this month yet.
reports.monthly.khataPro.title: Built for Khata Pro later
reports.monthly.khataPro.body: Monthly close, PDF/Excel export, approvals, reminders, and audit history will become organized-group tools later. The core ledger stays free.
reports.monthly.trust: Baki only reports the khata. It does not hold money, process payments, or take settlement fees.
expense.add.subtitle: Keep the split clear, the khata stays clean.
groups.create.subtitle: Pick a name — you can rename it any time.
groups.join.subtitle: Ask a friend who already opened the khata for the code.
settle.hero.subtitle: Choose a method, confirm payment, then record it in the khata.
settle.plan.body: Choose fewer payments or current balances, then record the outside-app payment.
settle.plan.mode.label: Settlement view
settle.plan.optimized.title: Simplified settlement plan
settle.plan.optimized.body: These suggestions settle the khata with the fewest payments.
settle.plan.raw.title: Raw balance view
settle.plan.raw.body: Uses current net balances. Simplified mode may reduce the number of payments.
settle.plan.fallback.title: Showing raw balance fallback
settle.plan.fallback.body: The simplified plan did not load, so Baki is using current balances.

expense.splitPreview.equal.title: Equal split across {{count}} people
expense.splitPreview.custom.title: Custom split for {{count}} people
expense.splitPreview.exact.body: Enter each member's amount so the total matches.
expense.splitPreview.percent.body: Percent values must add up to 100 before saving.
expense.splitPreview.shares.body: Use shares like 2:1 to split by ratio.

activity.empty.title: No activity yet

activity.summary.title: Recent ledger
activity.search.empty.title: No matching activity

settle.title: Settle up
settle.guide.title: How this settlement works
settle.guide.open.title: Open bKash/Nagad app
settle.guide.open.body: Use bKash or Nagad, or copy the number.
settle.guide.confirm.title: Confirm there
settle.guide.confirm.body: bKash or Nagad handles the payment outside Baki.
settle.guide.record.title: Record here
settle.guide.record.body: Baki adds a settlement entry after you confirm.
settle.method.bkash.subtitle: Open bKash or copy the number if the app is missing
settle.method.nagad.subtitle: Open Nagad or copy the number if the app is missing
settle.method.cash.subtitle: Record a hand-to-hand cash payment
settle.method.other.subtitle: Record bank transfer, card, or another method
settle.confirmation.title: Settled?
settle.confirmation.body: Only tap this after you confirm the payment in bKash or Nagad. Baki will add the settlement to the khata.
settle.notice.opened.title: Payment app opened
settle.notice.opened.body: Confirm the payment there, then return to Baki and mark it paid.
settle.notice.copied.title: Number copied
settle.notice.copied.body: Send the money from bKash or Nagad, then return here to mark it paid.
settle.notice.noNumber.title: No valid number
settle.notice.noNumber.body: Ask this member to add a bKash or Nagad number before using bKash/Nagad settlement.
settle.notice.receiveMfs.title: They need to pay
settle.notice.receiveMfs.body: This transfer starts from their bKash or Nagad app. Once you receive it, record it as cash or another method.
settle.empty.title: All settled up
settle.empty.body: No one needs to pay right now. The khata is clean.
sync.offline.banner: You're offline. Khata changes will be saved locally.
sync.offline.saved.title: Saved offline
sync.offline.saved.body: Will sync automatically when Baki is online.
sync.details.title: Sync
sync.details.body: Expenses and settlements saved offline will replay here when Baki can reach the ledger.
sync.details.pendingSubtitle: {{count}} changes are waiting to be sent
sync.details.failedSubtitle: {{count}} changes need repair or another retry
sync.details.empty.title: Everything is synced
sync.details.empty.body: There are no pending changes on this device.
sync.details.retryComplete.title: Sync attempt finished
sync.details.retryFailed.title: Sync could not start
sync.details.dismiss.confirm.title: Dismiss this failed item?
sync.details.dismiss.confirm.body: Only dismiss changes that cannot be replayed safely. The ledger change will stay off this device's sync queue.
sync.details.dismissed.title: Failed item dismissed
sync.details.dismissBlocked.title: Dismiss is locked
sync.details.dismissBlocked.body: Retry this item first. Baki only allows dismissing failed validation or permission errors.
sync.details.debugCopied.title: Debug details copied

settings.profile.name.label: Your name
settings.profile.phone.label: Phone
settings.theme.subtitle: Choose how Baki appears
settings.sync.title: Sync
settings.sync.subtitle: Review offline changes and failed syncs
settings.notifications.title: Notifications
settings.notifications.subtitle: Gentle reminders for new expenses and settlements
settings.notifications.body: Register this device for future Baki push notifications and choose which ledger updates may reach you.
settings.notifications.register.title: This device
settings.notifications.register.subtitle: Uses Expo push tokens and your Baki account only
This device token is saved. Server reminders can use it when delivery is enabled.
settings.notifications.preferences.title: Preferences
settings.notifications.preference.settle: Recorded bKash, Nagad, cash, or other settlements
settings.notifications.preference.remind: Low-pressure reminders when balances stay open
settings.notifications.error.title: Notification update failed
settings.notifications.error.body: Check notification permission and try again.
settings.export.title: Export data
settings.export.subtitle: Share a khata ledger as CSV
settings.export.body: Choose a khata to share its expense ledger as CSV. The export includes expense rows, payer names, split members, and paisa amounts.
settings.export.khatas.title: Khatas
settings.export.success.title: CSV ready to share
settings.export.error.title: Export failed
settings.export.empty.title: No khatas to export
settings.export.empty.body: Create a khata first, then export its ledger from here.
settings.privacy.title: Privacy & terms
settings.privacy.subtitle: Baki tracks ledgers; it never holds money
settings.privacy.body: Baki stores the minimum data needed to keep your khatas synced, protected, and useful for group members.
settings.privacy.boundary.title: Baki never holds money
settings.privacy.boundary.body: Settlements happen through bKash, Nagad, cash, or another method outside Baki. The app only records the ledger entry you choose to save.
settings.privacy.documents.title: Documents
settings.terms.title: Terms
settings.terms.subtitle: Ledger rules and payment boundary
settings.terms.body: Use Baki as a shared ledger. Confirm real payments outside the app before recording a settlement.
settings.terms.point.ledger: Ledger records come from what group members enter.
settings.terms.point.payments: Baki can open payment handoffs, but it does not process or hold money.
settings.terms.point.sync: Offline changes replay when the device reconnects; review failed sync items before dismissing them.
settings.terms.point.deletion: Account deletion is available after your active balances are settled.
settings.support.title: Support
settings.support.subtitle: Get help with OTP, khatas, or settlement links
settings.support.body: Use support for sign-in, khata, offline sync, settlement handoff, or account deletion questions.
settings.support.contact.title: Contact
settings.support.error.title: Support email could not open
settings.support.scope.title: Before sharing
settings.support.scope.body: Keep sensitive details out of support screenshots
settings.support.scope.subtitle: Do not send OTP codes, JWTs, full bKash/Nagad numbers, or payment transaction references.
settings.account.signOut.subtitle: Leave this device
settings.account.delete.subtitle: Available after your balances are settled
settings.account.safety.title: Account safety
settings.account.safety.body: Deleting removes your profile and membership, but keeps shared ledger history for other members.
settings.account.delete.confirm.title: Delete your account?
settings.account.delete.confirm.body: Deleting removes your profile, group memberships, and payment details. Existing expenses stay in the group ledger but without your name. This cannot be undone.
settings.account.delete.error.unsettled_: You still have unsettled balances. Settle up first, then you can delete.
settings.account.delete.error.generic: Couldn't delete the account — please try again.
settings.error.profile_load_failed: Couldn't load profile — showing offline copy.

dev.components.subtitle: Current design system state
dev.components.inputHelper: Name it after a mess, family, or trip
dev.components.toastBody: Components are rendering with Bengali and English copy.
